actionCalls.name: emailalert_BCBatchErrorNotificationCancelQuote
actionCalls.label: BC - Batch Error notification - cancel quote

actionCalls.name: FU_Feature_Update_quote_ready_to_be_submitted
actionCalls.label: FU - Feature Update quote ready to be submitted

actionCalls.name: TC_Trial_New_sale_access_notification
actionCalls.label: TC - Trial - New sale access notification

assignments.name: Assign_Billing_Quote_Processing_Sent_to_Zuora
assignments.label: Assign Billing Quote Processing - Sent to Zuora

assignments.name: Assign_Billing_Quote_Ready_for_Billing
assignments.label: Assign Billing Quote - Ready for Billing

assignments.name: Assign_Deal_Desk_Contract_Signed_Manually
assignments.label: Assign Deal Desk Contract Signed Manually

value.stringValue: Contract Signed Manually - Quote for Deal Desk Review

decisions.description: MQ-2516 - update the one-time product prices for the contracts
decisions.name: Change_in_submit_button
decisions.label: Change in submit button

rules.name: Payment_frequency_term_Other_non_standard_AND_Status_Ready_for_Billing_To_Deal_D
rules.label: Payment frequency/term= ‘Other non-standard’ AND Status= 'Ready for Billing' - To Deal Desk

rules.name: Contract_signed_manually_To_Deal_Desk
rules.label: Contract signed manually - To Deal Desk

decisions.name: Decision_26
decisions.label: IS quote start with quote for

rules.name: outcome_TrueBatchErrorNotificationCancelQuote
rules.conditionLogic: (1 OR 2) AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND 6 AND 7 AND NOT 8 AND NOT 9 AND NOT 10 AND NOT 11 and 12

rightValue.stringValue: by the quote is no longer the latest version

rules.label: True (Batch Error Notification - Cancel Quote)

decisions.name: Indication_on_account_if_they_re_on_new_old_catalog
decisions.label: Indication on account if they're on new\old catalog

rules.name: New_Catalog
rules.conditionLogic: (1 AND 2 AND 6 AND (3 OR 4)) OR (1 AND 5 AND 6)

rightValue.stringValue: No - replacing products with new catalog products

rules.label: New Catalog

rules.name: did_one_time_product_changed
rules.conditionLogic: ((1 OR 2) AND (3 OR 4 OR 5 OR 6) AND 7)
rules.label: did one time product changed

rules.name: Quote_is_Pending_Renewal
rules.conditionLogic: 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND( 6 OR 7 OR 1)
rules.label: Quote is Pending Renewal

decisions.description: When Quote Status is changed to 'Processed Directly in Zuora' or 'Sent To Zuora' and 'Subscription Type' equals 'New Subscription' -> 'Automatic_renewal_excluded_from_T_Cs__c' outcome will be executed
decisions.name: Rule_AR_Automatic_renewal_excluded_from_T_Cs_c
decisions.label: *Rule - (AR)* - Automatic_renewal_excluded_from_T_Cs__c

decisions.description: When 'Customer_requests_to_pay_immediately__c' is changed to True -> 'Customer pays immediately' outcome will be executed
decisions.name: Rule_CS_Customer_pays_immediately
decisions.label: *Rule - (CS)* - Customer pays immediately

decisions.name: Rule_FU_Feature_Update_quote_ready_to_be_submitted
decisions.label: *Rule (FU)* - Feature Update quote ready to be submitted

decisions.description: Once 'Quote Status' is changed to 'Sent To Zuora' or 'Processed Directly in Zuora' and No_Publicity_Right__c = True -> 'No Publicity Right' outcome will be executed
decisions.name: Rule_NP_No_Publicity_Right
decisions.label: *Rule - (NP)* - No Publicity Right

decisions.description: When the Quote Owner is changed -> 'Owner is Changed' outcome will be executed
decisions.name: Rule_OC_Owner_is_Changed
decisions.label: *Rule - (OC)* - Owner is Changed

decisions.description: When 'Prosus Flow' is changed to 'Prosus' -> 'Prosus' outcome will be executed
decisions.name: Rule_PR_Prosus_flow
decisions.label: *Rule (PR)* - Prosus flow

decisions.description: When Quote is created/updated and the 'Type of Solution' field is not null and 'Solution Generation' field is null -> 'Solution Generation Field Update' outcome will be executed
decisions.name: Rule_SG_Solution_Generation_Field_Update
decisions.label: *Rule - (SG)* - Solution Generation Field Update

decisions.description: When a new Quote is created or the 'Team/ Group/ Division' field is changed or the 'Quote Status' field is changed and 'Quote Status' equals 'Sent To Zuora' or 'Processed Directly in Zuora' and the field 'Team/ Group/ Divisio' is not blank -> 'Team/ Group/ Division is changed' outcome will be executed
decisions.name: Rule_TGD_Team_Group_Division_is_changed
decisions.label: *Rule - (TGD)* - Team/ Group/Division is changed

decisions.description: When one of the following fields is changed and 'Trial Quote' = TRUE, 'Quote Status' = Sent To Zuora or Processed Directly in Zuora, 'Quote Business Type' = New Sale or Feature Update -> 'Trial Quote' outcome will be executed
decisions.name: Rule_TQ_Trial_Quote
decisions.label: *Rule - (TQ)* - Trial Quote

decisions.description: When Quote is updated and 'Renewal By Renewal Link' = True, 'Valid Until' = Today, 'Quote Status' not equal to 'Cancelled', 'Valid Until' not equal Today+7 -> 'Valid date +7 days' outcome will be executed
decisions.name: Rule_VD_Valid_date_7_days
decisions.label: *Rule - (VD)* - Valid date +7 days

decisions.description: MQ-2562 - if the contract term is 60 or 48 and there is only one payment, then it will update the specific payment term
decisions.name: Update_4_Or_5_years_contract
decisions.label: Update 4 Or 5 years contract

decisions.description: MQ-2139 - if the contact not created in Zuora we update the Sold to - new contact checkbox so the reps won't be able to change the country
decisions.name: Update_New_Contact_as_Sold_to_new_contact
decisions.label: Update New Contact as Sold to - new contact

Flow.description: MIS-7585 MQ-2562 - Updating 4 or 5 Years payment MIS-6981 - Disconnected Zendesk Ticket Creation MIS-6889 - fixed case subject for Billing Cases MIS-6900 - open a case sent to zoura 16\3\25 Tal MQ-2463 MIS-6812 - remove *Rule (BE)* - Batch Error Notification MIS-6828 - Assign Billing Quote Processing - Sent to Zuora MIS-6203 - Create Case MQ-2305 - change quote name to include number MIS-5944 42matters email alert - Quote Product Access Email Last - MQ-2139 MQ-2228 MIS-5343 MQ-1971 MIS-3947 MQ-1616 MQ-1411 (adjusted 25 Jun 22) MQ-1320 (adjusted 20 Dec 21) MQ-1402 (12 jun 2022) MQ-1445 (1 april 2022) MIS-3947 (18/07/2023)

formulas.name: AdmtercicksEmailAmendmentSubject
formulas.expression: 'Amendment '+{!$Record.zqu__Account__r.Name}+': Ametricks purchase in Q2C from Similarweb'

formulas.name: AdmtercicksEmailNewSaleSubject
formulas.expression: 'New Sale '+{!$Record.zqu__Account__r.Name} + ': Ametricks purchase in Q2C from Similarweb'

formulas.name: QuoteName

formulas.description: MIS-6828 - Cases opened from Quote by System User , should be by Quote Owner
formulas.name: Sent_to_Zuora_Requester

Flow.label: Quote - Record-Triggered Flow - After Save

recordUpdates.description: Update 'Auto Renew' and 'Invoice Separately' checkboxes to False on the Quote
recordUpdates.name: CP_Checkboxes_to_be_unchecked
recordUpdates.label: CP - Checkboxes to be unchecked

recordUpdates.description: Update 'Logo_Rights__c' field on the related Account (if it doesn't equal 'No name/logo rights') to 'No name/logo rights'
recordUpdates.name: NP_Update_Account
recordUpdates.label: NP - Update Account

recordUpdates.description: Update 'Logo_Rights__c' field on the related opportunity (if it doesn't equal 'No name/logo rights') to 'No name/logo rights'
recordUpdates.name: NP_Update_Opportunity
recordUpdates.label: NP - Update Opportunity

recordUpdates.description: Update the' Quote Owner Email' field on the related Requests with the value from Quote.Owner.Email
recordUpdates.name: OC_Update_Requests
recordUpdates.label: OC - Update Requests

recordUpdates.description: Update 'PGF__c' field on the Quote with a frPGF formula
recordUpdates.name: PR_Update_PGF
recordUpdates.label: PR - Update PGF

recordUpdates.description: Update the 'Solution Generation' field with the value from the 'Type of Solution' field
recordUpdates.name: SG_Solution_Generation_Field_Update
recordUpdates.label: SG - Solution Generation Field Update

recordUpdates.description: Update 'Team/ Group/ Division' field on the Account if the value is not the same
recordUpdates.name: TGD_Update_Account
recordUpdates.label: TGD - Update Account

recordUpdates.description: Update the 'Trial Quote' field to TRUE on the related opportunity
recordUpdates.name: TQ_Update_Opporunity
recordUpdates.label: TQ - Update Opporunity

recordUpdates.name: Update_Contact_as_sold_new_quote
recordUpdates.label: Update Contact as sold - new quote

recordUpdates.description: MQ-1971 - update account as migrated to new catalog
recordUpdates.name: Update_migrate_to_new_catalog_to_true
recordUpdates.label: Update migrate to new catalog to true

recordUpdates.name: Update_one_time_price_in_Quote
recordUpdates.label: Update one time price in Quote

recordUpdates.description: Update the 'Valid Date' field on the Quote with the value 'Today+7'
recordUpdates.name: VU
recordUpdates.label: VU - update valid date

subflows.name: Create_Assign_Billing_Quote_Processing_Sent_to_Zuora
subflows.label: Create Assign Billing Quote Processing - Sent to Zuora

subflows.name: Create_Billing_Quote_Ready_for_Billing
subflows.label: Create Billing Quote - Ready for Billing

subflows.name: Create_Deal_Desk_Contract_Signed_Manually
subflows.label: Create Deal Desk Contract Signed Manually

subflows.name: Create_Deal_Desk_Non_Standard_Custom_Contract_Case
subflows.label: Create Deal Desk Non-Standard/Custom Contract Case

subflows.name: Sent_to_Zoura_Quote_Product_Access_Email
subflows.label: Sent to Zoura - Quote Product Access Email

textTemplates.name: AmendmentEmailTemplateAdmetricks
textTemplates.text:
Hi,


Please note that a new purchase was made of Admetricks by Similarweb:

Quote link

Quote business type: {!QuoteBusinessTypepicklistlable}

Sold to contact email: {!$Record.zqu__SoldToContact__r.Email}


Activation Date:

{!$Record.zqu__Service_Activation_Date__c}

List of Added Products: 

{!Table_AdmetricksFull_Amendment}


Please update the subscription accordingly

Thanks

textTemplates.name: NewSaleEmailAdmetrics
textTemplates.text:
Hi,


Please note that a new purchase was made of Admetricks by Similarweb:


Quote link

Quote business type: {!QuoteBusinessTypepicklistlable}

Sold to contact email: {!$Record.zqu__SoldToContact__r.Email}


Activation Date:

{!$Record.zqu__Service_Activation_Date__c}

List of Added Products: 

{!Table_AdmetricksFull_NewSale}


Please activate the subscription accordingly

Thanks

textTemplates.name: Table_AdmerticksHeader_Amendment
textTemplates.text: <tr style="background-color: #4CAF50; color: white;"> <th>Quote Rate Plan</th> <th>Conract Wording</th> <th>Quantity</th> <th>Amendment Type</th> </tr>

textTemplates.name: Table_AdmerticksHeader_NewSale
textTemplates.text: <tr style="background-color: #4CAF50; color: white;"> <th>Quote Rate Plan</th> <th>Contract Wording</th> <th>Quantity</th> </tr>
